sections.label: TOOL CALL: python

<function=python>
<parameter=code>
seg = current_frame.segmentation

    cc = sum(p[1] for p in b)/len(b)
    print(n['id'], n['color'], n['pixels'], int(cr), int(cc))
</parameter>
